suggestions: Your summary is too general. Add your programme and target role.
Your skills list is too broad. Keep only relevant and supported skills.
Your experience bullets describe duties, but not contribution.
Your CV is too long for a student profile. Remove weaker items.
Add one project or volunteer role to strengthen your profile.
Use more action verbs in your experience bullets.
Include at least one measurable result or achievement.
Remove clichés like 'hardworking' or 'team player' without evidence.
Ensure your education section includes relevant coursework.
Add a final year project or thesis to strengthen academic profile.
